since_last: 70% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.63% · BTC +2.40% · Gold +1.54% · Nasdaq100 +1.56%. 70% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.99%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.99%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.98%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +11.19%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +11.19%, CBRS +10.33%, SKHY +9.26%, MU +8.99%, AMAT +7.31%. Laggards: OKTA -5.03%, CHKP -3.68%, PANW -3.52%, S -3.06%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.52% at $127.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
